description: Patient is currently taking diuretics.

name: Active NSAID use
description: Patient is currently taking non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs.

description: Patient has risk factors for urinary and genital tract infections.

name: Urinary tract abnormality exists
description: Patient has a urinary tract abnormality such as malformation, kidney stones, or polycystic kidney disease.

name: Active insulin use
description: Patient is currently using insulin.

name: Hypoglycemia risk exists
description: Patient has a history of recurrent hypoglycemia.

name: Edema exists
description: Patient has documented edema.

name: Thirst exists
description: Patient exhibits thirst as a symptom of volume depletion.

name: Poor skin turgor exists
description: Patient exhibits poor skin turgor as a sign of volume depletion.

name: Low ocular tension exists
description: Patient exhibits low ocular tension as a sign of volume depletion.

name: Orthostatic hypotension exists
description: Patient exhibits orthostatic hypotension as a sign of volume depletion.

name: Urinary and genital tract infection exists
description: Patient has a urinary or genital tract infection.

name: Recurrent urinary and genital tract infection
description: Patient has had recurrent urinary or genital tract infections.
